name: Greptile Open Source Program
description: Free AI code review for open source projects. Non-commercial projects with MIT, Apache, or GPL licenses get full access to Greptile's GitHub PR review bot at no cost.

perks.title: Free AI Code Review
perks.description: 100% off Greptile for eligible open source repositories. Automated GitHub PR reviews with full codebase understanding.

perks.title: Code Context & Custom Rules
perks.description: AI that understands your codebase context, with support for custom rules and learning from your repo.

eligibility: Open source project with MIT, Apache, or GPL license.
Repository owner or admin able to install apps to the repository.
applicationProcess: Apply via the Greptile Open Source Program page with email, name, and repository link.
Confirm you are an owner or admin of the repository and can install apps.
